headline.text: L3 ML1 piston faulted *3 times overnight* — hopper plate clogged with almonds, maintenance working at window close.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran caramel and chocolate lines with three quick fixes. Sollich 2 labeler roller slipped due to loose set screws at 15:24, tightened and back in 4 minutes. Sollich 3 metal detector belt broke at 22:46, replaced by 02:51. Sollich 4 vanilla pump reset after Friday's power outage.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 cleared three machine faults inside 30 minutes. ML2 air compressor tripped at 17:49, reset by 18:17. ML2 mold jam on rail 16 at 01:55, cleared by 02:16. FFS line paused at 06:26 to build new recipe for weight adjustment, running by 06:30.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 piston faulted three times between 01:54 and 06:30, still down at window close with hopper plate clogged by almonds. ML4 scraper sensor cleaned in 14 minutes at 04:34. Truffle line Cute Cavanna repaired by 08:38. Truffle conveyor motor failed at 14:08 and remains out of service — undersized for load. Truffle roller to belt #2 bent at 04:36, no replacement available.

resolved.title: Sollich 2 labeling machine roller not rotating
resolved.summary: Blue roller that pulls labels stopped rotating at 15:24, set screws were loose.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 15:28 — "The set screws were loose and allowing it to slip. Maintenance adjusted the blue roller, and it is now working correctly" (Caleb York / Elizabeth Hernandez).

resolved.title: Sollich 3 metal detector belt broken
resolved.summary: Metal detector belt broke at 22:46, line stopped at 02:38 to replace belt.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 02:51 — "Line is back to run" (Luis Falcon).

resolved.title: Sollich 4 vanilla pump config wrong after power outage
resolved.summary: Vanilla pump settings incorrect due to Friday power outage, operator reset it.
resolved.resolution: Reset at 08:09 — "the vanilla pump configuration was not correct due to the power outage on Friday. I reset it, and it is now working properly" (Marcos Jimenez).

resolved.title: ML2 air compressor faulted
resolved.summary: Air compressor tripped at 17:49, Raymond Fleming reset it and line resumed.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 18:17 — "Air compressor was faulted out. Maintenance reset it and the line is running" (Alan Todd).

resolved.title: ML2 roller PG20 pulling fill too thick on silver side
resolved.summary: Roller PG20 was dispensing fill too thick, maintenance corrected it.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance resolved by 18:27 — "Ya mantenimiento lo soluciono" (ML2 FW).

resolved.title: ML2 mold jam on rail 16
resolved.summary: Mold jammed on rail 16 at 01:55, maintenance cleared it with no bent parts found.
resolved.resolution: Line up at 02:16 — "Jam is on rail 16, maintenance did not see any bent parts. Line is up" (Gustavo Rodas).

resolved.title: FFS line down for recipe adjustment
resolved.summary: Line paused to create new recipe because QA specified different weight for caramel and almond.

resolved.title: ML1 C6 conveyor belt misaligned
resolved.summary: C6 belt misaligned at 14:54, caused chocolate spillage and scrap while maintenance realigned it.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance realigned belt by end of shift — "conveyor belt C6 became misaligned...maintenance team worked to realign the belt" (Imperial).

resolved.title: ML4 TG3 broken door stopping machine
resolved.summary: TG3 had a broken door that wouldn't close and stopped the machine, maintenance fixed it this morning.
resolved.resolution: Fixed by maintenance — "TG3 had issues this morning with a broken door not closing and stopping the machine. Maintenance fixed that" (Itzel Chavez).

resolved.title: Truffle Cute Cavanna error at startup
resolved.summary: Cute Cavanna showed error at 08:14, part repaired and sanitized.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 08:38 — "The part has been repaired and is being sanitized" (TruffleLine Enrober).

resolved.title: ML4 scraper fault
resolved.summary: Line down at 04:34 for scraper fault, sensor cleaned and line restarted.
resolved.resolution: Back up at 04:48 — "Sensor cleaned, line is back up" (Kimberly Morales).

resolved.title: Truffle Cavanna 1 sensor not detecting wraps
resolved.summary: Sensor on Cavanna 1 failing to detect wraps, throwing labels off center.
resolved.resolution: Calibrated at 06:39 — "This sensor is now calibrated and good to go" (Nathan Ruiz).

needs_attention.title: ML1 piston faulting repeatedly, hopper plate clogged
needs_attention.summary: Piston failed at 01:54, fixed at 02:11, faulted again at 02:19, back up at 05:48, down again at 06:04; hopper plate clogged with almonds as of 06:45.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance checking clogged hopper plate as of 07:01, third piston fault since 01:54.

needs_attention.title: Truffle line conveyor motor undersized and out of service
needs_attention.summary: Conveyor motor overheating under load at 09:54, swapped motor at 14:08 but still can't handle weight; needs more powerful motor.
needs_attention.status: Out of service as of 14:08, Nathan Ruiz reports motor too small for belt size and weight, "can't handle it" even at 100% power.

needs_attention.title: Truffle roller to belt #2 bent, no replacement
needs_attention.summary: Roller bent at 04:36, cannot be put back into place properly; maintenance has no replacement available.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance reported no replacement available as of 05:35 — "Maintenance said they don't have replacement for it" (Raoul Lubain).
